steps.title: Find a decline in ice days
steps.content: The researcher's claim is about a decline in lake ice duration from the early 1980s to the mid-2000s. The supporting data must compare the same lake across both winters and show fewer ice days in 2005-06 than in 1980-81.

steps.title: Reject incomplete comparisons
steps.content: A shows Spirit Lake increasing from about 100 to 125 days. C gives only the highest 2005-06 value, so it does not show change over time. D is not supported by Spirit Lake's increase. Lake Kallavesi drops from about 175 to 145 days. The answer is B.
